name: agent-flow
description: Real-time visualization of Claude Code agent orchestration

chatParticipants.name: agent-flow
chatParticipants.description: Real-time visualization of AI agent orchestration — see active sessions, tool calls, and agent activity.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show current agent session status and activity

commands.name: open
commands.description: Open the Agent Flow visualizer panel

commands.name: sessions
commands.description: List all active and recent agent sessions

languageModelTools.name: agentFlow_getSessionStatus
languageModelTools.description: Returns the current status of agent sessions being visualized by Agent Flow, including active sessions, tool calls in progress, and connection state.

sessionId.description: Optional session ID to get status for a specific session. If omitted, returns all active sessions.

agentVisualizer.devServerPort.description: Port for the development server. Set to 0 (default) for production mode, or 3002 for development.

agentVisualizer.eventLogPath.description: Path to JSONL event log file to watch for agent events

agentVisualizer.autoOpen.description: Automatically open the visualizer when an agent session starts

agentVisualizer.watchCopilotChat.description: Watch GitHub Copilot Chat activity and visualize tool calls and agent events

scripts.build:all: npm run build:webview && npm run build
